projectSummary: Source: manual. Project Alpha (#project-alpha) is in a tight late-stage phase where backend, UI, and QA work are colliding on a near-term deployment. john_dev has marked the API endpoints ready for testing and published docs to /wiki/api-docs; mary_ui is integrating those docs into the UI today; alex_qa surfaced 5 bugs in the login flow (logged in Jira at High priority), with password validation flagged as the most critical. sarah_pm has called a 2pm team meeting to discuss deployment blockers. The critical path is fixing the login-flow bugs (especially password validation) and Mary finishing her today's UI integration before a deployment decision is made.
objectives: Ship Project Alpha's API endpoints through testing into deployment.
Resolve the 5 login-flow bugs Alex surfaced (high priority in Jira) before deployment, with password validation as the lead fix.
Land Mary's UI integration of the new API documentation today.
Convene the 2pm team meeting to resolve Project Alpha deployment blockers.
Reach a deployment go/no-go decision once bugs and UI integration converge.

tasks.name: Publish API documentation to the wiki (/wiki/api-docs)
Support testing of the new API endpoints (hand-off to QA)
Log the 5 login-flow bugs in Jira with High priority
Fix critical password validation issue in the login flow (highest of the 5 reported bugs)
Fix the remaining 4 bugs in the login flow
Integrate the API documentation (from /wiki/api-docs) into the UI today
Hold the 2pm team meeting to review Project Alpha deployment blockers
Decide a deployment go/no-go once bug fixes and UI integration land

risks.name: 5 bugs in the login flow, with password validation flagged as the most critical
risks.description: 5 bugs in the login flow, with password validation flagged as the most critical
risks.solution: Prioritize the password validation fix immediately; have john_dev implement, alex_qa verify, and sarah_pm gate the deployment on regression of all 5 bugs in Jira before the 2pm meeting decisions are finalized.

risks.name: Deployment blockers for Project Alpha are unresolved and only scheduled for review at 2pm
risks.description: Deployment blockers for Project Alpha are unresolved and only scheduled for review at 2pm
risks.solution: sarah_pm should circulate a blocker list to the team before the 2pm meeting so the discussion is concrete; pre-agree a minimum-release cut so a single unresolved blocker does not slip the entire deployment.

risks.name: UI integration of API docs happening today in parallel with active login-flow bug fixes creates a merge/rework risk
risks.description: UI integration of API docs happening today in parallel with active login-flow bug fixes creates a merge/rework risk
risks.solution: mary_ui should integrate against the stable wiki API doc and freeze the integration surface for the day; if bug fixes require contract changes, john_dev must version the endpoints and notify mary_ui before she merges.

risks.name: No explicit test plan or testing owner named for the new API endpoints despite them being 'ready for testing'
risks.description: No explicit test plan or testing owner named for the new API endpoints despite them being 'ready for testing'
risks.solution: Assign a testing owner at the 2pm meeting (likely alex_qa) with a defined test checklist for the API endpoints so the 'ready for testing' status moves to verified before deployment.

recommendations.title: Treat the password validation bug as the highest-priority fix — pair john_dev and alex_qa on it today so regression can be verified before the 2pm meeting.
recommendations.description: Treat the password validation bug as the highest-priority fix — pair john_dev and alex_qa on it today so regression can be verified before the 2pm meeting.

recommendations.title: john_dev should freeze the API contract going into Mary's day-of integration, or version any breaking change and notify Mary before she merges, so her UI work is not undone by backend fixes.
recommendations.description: john_dev should freeze the API contract going into Mary's day-of integration, or version any breaking change and notify Mary before she merges, so her UI work is not undone by backend fixes.

recommendations.title: sarah_pm circulates a blocker list ahead of the 2pm meeting so the discussion is concrete and ends with named owners and dates for each blocker.
recommendations.description: sarah_pm circulates a blocker list ahead of the 2pm meeting so the discussion is concrete and ends with named owners and dates for each blocker.

recommendations.title: Pre-define a minimum-release cut for Project Alpha at the meeting so a single unresolved item does not slip the entire deployment.
recommendations.description: Pre-define a minimum-release cut for Project Alpha at the meeting so a single unresolved item does not slip the entire deployment.

recommendations.title: Assign a dedicated testing owner for the new API endpoints (likely alex_qa) at the 2pm meeting and gate deployment on a completed test pass for those endpoints.
recommendations.description: Assign a dedicated testing owner for the new API endpoints (likely alex_qa) at the 2pm meeting and gate deployment on a completed test pass for those endpoints.
